pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to support the new JDK.
Bump the parent POM version from 0.0.2 to 0.1.0.
Refactor SCM and URL properties to use a separate github.owner property for better maintainability.
Add javadoc options to suppress doclint warnings which are stricter in newer JDKs.
Add the central-publishing-maven-plugin for publishing to Maven Central.
Add the launch4j-maven-plugin for creating Windows executables.
Add the maven-surefire-plugin version property for test execution.
Add the maven-antrun-plugin version property for running Ant tasks.
Add the maven-assembly-plugin version property for creating distribution archives.
Add the maven-shade-plugin version property for creating uber-jars.
Update the maven-site-plugin version from 3.7.1 to 3.9.0.
Align the maven-surefire-report-plugin version with the maven-surefire-plugin version.
Add the maven-jxr-plugin version property for cross-referencing source code.
Add the log4j version property for logging dependencies.
Add the args4j version property for command line argument parsing.
Add the commons-validator version property for validation utilities.
Add the commons-io version property for IO utilities.
Add the commons-lang3 version property for language utilities.
Add the freemarker version property for template processing.
Add the gson version property for JSON processing.
Add the hamcrest-all version property for testing matchers.
Add the htmlcleaner version property for HTML parsing.
Add the junit4 version property for unit testing.
Add the mockito-all version property for mocking in tests.
Add the pdfbox-lucene version property for PDF processing.
Add the apache-poi version property for Office document processing.
Add the com.bitplan.javafx version property for internal library dependency.
Add the com.bitplan.gui version property for internal library dependency.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the latest version 0.0.39 and add project badges and documentation links.
README.md.human_impl: Added shields.io badges, updated version to 0.0.39, and added links to wiki and license.

README.md.general_idea: Convert the version history from a simple list to a structured Markdown table for better readability.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced bullet points with a Markdown table containing Version, Date, and Changes columns.

README.md.general_idea: Populate the changelog with the complete history of releases up to the current version.
README.md.human_impl: Added rows for versions 0.0.3 through 0.0.39 describing specific dependency bumps and fixes.
